name: maison-beaute-newsletter-studio

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, subject: $('Format HTML Email').first().json.subject, recipient: $('Format HTML Email').first().json.recipient }) }}

notes:
Module 4 — Newsletter Studio email delivery.
Triggered by FastAPI POST /newsletter/generate when send_email=true.

Payload fields used:
  subject_line  → email subject + header banner (EXACT, no regeneration)
  preview_text  → preheader hidden text + italic subtitle
  body          → split on \n\n into paragraphs
  cta           → CTA button label
  new_products  → matched via PRODUCT_MAP for product cards (name, SKU, image, badge)
  recipient     → To: address (from N8N_NEWSLETTER_RECIPIENT env var in FastAPI)

PRODUCT_MAP in the code node covers the 3 Newsletter Studio SKUs:
  Lancôme Lip Idôle JuicyTreat  WI-000002100  MAKE-UP
  La Mer The Treatment Lotion   WI-000000148  SKIN-CARE
  U Beauty Resurfacing Compound WI-000000440  SKIN-CARE

Images served from raw.githubusercontent.com (public). Falls back gracefully
if image 404s (onerror hides the img tag).

Credentials required: Gmail OAuth2 configured in n8n Cloud.
